for f in files:
    p = notes / f
    if not p.exists():

        continue
    fm, _ = split_frontmatter(p.read_text(encoding=&#39;utf-8&#39;))

    kc = fm.get(&#39;key_concept&#39;, &#39;&#39;)

    print(f&#39;KC1:  {kc1}&#39;)

```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 -c "
import sys
from pathlib import Path
sys.path.insert(0, 'scripts')
from notes_content import split_frontmatter

files = '''accountability.md anti-fragile-systems.md atomic-notes.md blameless-postmortem.md building-a-second-brain.md by-their-fruits.md capture.md change-management.md christianity-and-politics.md coaching-ethics.md commonplace-book.md composure.md compounding.md continuous-improvement.md control-the-rhythm.md creative-blocks.md creative-output.md decision-quality.md deep-work.md deliberate-practice.md develop-dont-endanger.md digital-garden.md digital-serendipity.md discipline.md dont-worry.md drafting-in-public.md duty-of-care.md emotional-regulation.md energy-protects-judgment.md eternal-principles.md eternal-rewards.md ethical-leadership.md evergreen-notes.md execution.md faith-and-works.md failure-as-feedback.md finish-strong.md follow-their-lead.md forgiveness.md free-grace.md frictionless-capture.md future-proofing-knowledge.md gtd-vs-para.md habit-formation.md heart-righteousness.md hierarchy-of-controls.md humility-and-service.md inbox-zero.md information-diet.md integrity-when-no-ones-watching.md integrity.md intellectual-sourcing.md joy.md judge-not.md judgment-seat.md justification.md'''.split()

notes = Path('content/english/notes')
for f in files:
    p = notes / f
    if not p.exists():
        print(f'MISSING: {f}')
        continue
    fm, _ = split_frontmatter(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    desc = fm.get('description', '')
    kc = fm.get('key_concept', '')
    kc1 = kc.strip().split('\n')[0].strip() if kc else ''
    dup = 'DUP' if desc.strip() == kc1 else ''
    print(f'=== {f} {dup}')
    print(f'DESC: {desc}')
    print(f'KC1:  {kc1}')
    print()
"

```

```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 -c "
import sys
from pathlib import Path
import yaml
sys.path.insert(0, 'scripts')
from notes_content import split_frontmatter

files = '''accountability.md anti-fragile-systems.md atomic-notes.md blameless-postmortem.md building-a-second-brain.md by-their-fruits.md capture.md change-management.md christianity-and-politics.md coaching-ethics.md commonplace-book.md composure.md compounding.md continuous-improvement.md control-the-rhythm.md creative-blocks.md creative-output.md decision-quality.md deep-work.md deliberate-practice.md develop-dont-endanger.md digital-garden.md digital-serendipity.md discipline.md dont-worry.md drafting-in-public.md duty-of-care.md emotional-regulation.md energy-protects-judgment.md eternal-principles.md eternal-rewards.md ethical-leadership.md evergreen-notes.md execution.md faith-and-works.md failure-as-feedback.md finish-strong.md follow-their-lead.md forgiveness.md free-grace.md frictionless-capture.md future-proofing-knowledge.md gtd-vs-para.md habit-formation.md heart-righteousness.md hierarchy-of-controls.md humility-and-service.md inbox-zero.md information-diet.md integrity-when-no-ones-watching.md integrity.md intellectual-sourcing.md joy.md judge-not.md judgment-seat.md justification.md'''.split()

notes = Path('content/english/notes')
for f in files:
    p = notes / f
    if not p.exists():
        print(f'MISSING: {f}')
        continue
    raw_fm, _ = split_frontmatter(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    fm = yaml.safe_load(raw_fm) or {}
    desc = fm.get('description', '')
    kc = fm.get('key_concept', '')
    kc1 = kc.strip().split('\n')[0].strip() if kc else ''
    dup = 'DUP' if desc.strip() == kc1 else ''
    print(f'=== {f} {dup}')
    print(f'DESC: {desc}')
    print(f'KC1:  {kc1}')
    print()
"

```

```
=== accountability.md DUP
DESC: Clear ownership - who answers for the outcome, the miss, and the fix.
KC1:  Clear ownership - who answers for the outcome, the miss, and the fix.

=== anti-fragile-systems.md 
DESC: Fragile systems break when an app shuts down. I build around plain files, open formats, and exports I actually test.
KC1:  Note systems that survive app shutdowns - plain files, open formats, and backups I actually test.

=== atomic-notes.md 
DESC: One claim I'd say out loud - too many `and`s, split it.
KC1:  One claim I'd say out loud - too many ands, split it.

=== blameless-postmortem.md 
DESC: After rollback restores service, learn what broke in the system - not who to punish for pushing deploy.
KC1:  [[Rollback Principle]] gets users back on the old build; blameless postmortem gets judgment back.

=== building-a-second-brain.md DUP
DESC: Offload ideas so my head can think, not hoard.
KC1:  Offload ideas so my head can think, not hoard.

=== by-their-fruits.md 
DESC: Discern teachers and teaching by outcome - grapes from grapevines, thorns from thistles.
KC1:  Jesus pairs this with [[Judge Not]]: don't condemn souls, but do evaluate fruit. (Matthew 7:16-20).

=== capture.md 
DESC: Save what resonates into one inbox I trust - then empty it weekly.
KC1:  Friction kills capture.

MISSING: change-management.md
=== christianity-and-politics.md 
DESC: Live as a citizen under lawful government and as a disciple under Christ - pay civic duty, love neighbors across tribes, refuse to make any party or power ultimate.
KC1:  [[Render Unto Caesar]] names the split: coin to Caesar, self to God.

=== coaching-ethics.md 
DESC: Develop the person without hiding behind their consent when the drill is unsafe or pointless.
KC1:  Consent doesn't erase the job when the drill is unsafe.

=== commonplace-book.md DUP
DESC: A personal book of quotes and ideas worth keeping - ancestor of linked notes.
KC1:  A personal book of quotes and ideas worth keeping - ancestor of linked n
… (output truncated)
```

```
diff --git a/content/english/notes/abide-in-me.md b/content/english/notes/abide-in-me.md
index b30f067..2a2a42a 100644
--- a/content/english/notes/abide-in-me.md
+++ b/content/english/notes/abide-in-me.md
@@ -1,10 +1,9 @@
 ---
 title: "Abide in Me"
 meta_title: "Abide in Me - Fruit from Union with Christ"
-description: "Stay connected to Christ the way branches stay in the vine - apart from him you can do nothing; fruit comes from union (John 15:1-11)."
+description: "I bear fruit when I stay connected to Christ, not when I white-knuckle harder on my own."
 key_concept: |
-  Abiding is ongoing dependence, not a one-time conversion event.
-  
+  Abiding is ongoing dependence, not a one-time conversion event. (John 15:1-11).
   Pruning hurts but serves fruitfulness. Under [[Free Grace]], fruit doesn't earn the branch's place in the vine - the branch bears fruit because it's connected. [[Fruits of the Spirit]] names the cluster Galatians lists - love through self-control - grown by walking in the Spirit, not white-knuckling. [[Sanctification]] is the slow becoming that abiding produces over time. Self-powered "fruit" without abiding is the dead wood Jesus removes - same trap as [[Compounding]] when I treat spiritual growth as pure self-stacked effort.
 examples:
   - "I snap at my kid after a week with almost no prayer or Scripture, and I know where the fruit went - abiding is opening the Bible before the news feed wins again."
@@ -53,3 +52,4 @@ cards:
     back: "His words - read Scripture."
```

import re

    p = notes / f
    raw_fm, _ = split_frontmatter(p.read_text(encoding=&#39;utf-8&#39;))
    fm = yaml.safe_load(raw_fm) or {}

    kc1 = fm.get(&#39;key_concept&#39;, &#39;&#39;).strip().split(&#39;\n&#39;)[0].strip() if fm.get(&#39;key_concept&#39;) else &#39;&#39;

        bad.append(f&#39;DUP {f}&#39;)
    if re.search(r&#39;\d+:\d+&#39;, desc):
        bad.append(f&#39;VERSE {f}: {desc[:60]}&#39;)

```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 -c "
import sys
from pathlib import Path
import yaml
sys.path.insert(0, 'scripts')
from notes_content import split_frontmatter

files = open('scripts/_batch2-descriptions.py').read().split('DESCRIPTIONS: dict[str, str] = {')[1].split('}')[0]
import re
names = re.findall(r'\"([^\"]+\.md)\"', files)
notes = Path('content/english/notes')
bad = []
for f in names:
    p = notes / f
    raw_fm, _ = split_frontmatter(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    fm = yaml.safe_load(raw_fm) or {}
    desc = fm.get('description', '').strip()
    kc1 = fm.get('key_concept', '').strip().split('\n')[0].strip() if fm.get('key_concept') else ''
    if desc == kc1:
        bad.append(f'DUP {f}')
    if re.search(r'\d+:\d+', desc):
        bad.append(f'VERSE {f}: {desc[:60]}')
print('issues:', bad or 'none')
print('checked', len(names), 'files')
"

```

from notes_content import split_frontmatter

names = &#39;&#39;&#39;accountability.md anti-fragile-systems.md atomic-notes.md blameless-postmortem.md building-a-second-brain.md by-their-fruits.md capture.md christianity-and-politics.md coaching-ethics.md commonplace-book.md composure.md compounding.md continuous-improvement.md control-the-rhythm.md creative-blocks.md creative-output.md decision-quality.md deep-work.md deliberate-practice.md develop-dont-endanger.md digital-garden.md digital-serendipity.md discipline.md dont-worry.md drafting-in-public.md duty-of-care.md emotional-regulation.md energy-protects-judgment.md eternal-principles.md eternal-rewards.md ethical-leadership.md evergreen-notes.md execution.md faith-and-works.md failure-as-feedback.md finish-strong.md follow-their-lead.md forgiveness.md future-proofing-knowledge.md gtd-vs-para.md habit-formation.md heart-righteousness.md hierarchy-of-controls.md humility-and-service.md inbox-zero.md information-diet.md integrity-when-no-ones-watching.md integrity.md intellectual-sourcing.md joy.md judge-not.md judgment-seat.md justification.md&#39;&#39;&#39;.split()
notes = Path(&#39;content/english/notes&#39;)
bad = []
for f in names:
    p = notes / f
    if not p.exists():
        bad.append(f&#39;MISSING {f}&#39;)
        continue
    raw_fm, _ = split_frontmatter(p.read_text(encoding=&#39;utf-8&#39;))
    fm = yaml.safe_load(raw_fm) or {}
    desc = fm.get(&#39;description&#39;, &#39;&#39;).strip()
    kc = fm.get(&#39;key_concept&#39;, &#39;&#39;)
    kc1 = kc.strip().split(&#39;\n&#39;)[0].strip() if isinstance(kc, str) and kc else &#39;&#39;
    if desc == kc1:
        bad.append(f&#39;DUP {f}&#39;)
    if re.search(r&#39;(?:Matthew|Mark|Luke|John|Romans|Galatians)\s+\d+:\d+|\(\d+:\d+&#39;, desc):
        bad.append(f&#39;VERSE {f}&#39;)
print(&#39;issues:&#39;, bad or &#39;none&#39;)
print(&#39;checked&#39;, len(names), &#39;files&#39;)
&#34;
</summary>
```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 -c "
import sys, re
from pathlib import Path
import yaml
sys.path.insert(0, 'scripts')
from notes_content import split_frontmatter

names = '''accountability.md anti-fragile-systems.md atomic-notes.md blameless-postmortem.md building-a-second-brain.md by-their-fruits.md capture.md christianity-and-politics.md coaching-ethics.md commonplace-book.md composure.md compounding.md continuous-improvement.md control-the-rhythm.md creative-blocks.md creative-output.md decision-quality.md deep-work.md deliberate-practice.md develop-dont-endanger.md digital-garden.md digital-serendipity.md discipline.md dont-worry.md drafting-in-public.md duty-of-care.md emotional-regulation.md energy-protects-judgment.md eternal-principles.md eternal-rewards.md ethical-leadership.md evergreen-notes.md execution.md faith-and-works.md failure-as-feedback.md finish-strong.md follow-their-lead.md forgiveness.md future-proofing-knowledge.md gtd-vs-para.md habit-formation.md heart-righteousness.md hierarchy-of-controls.md humility-and-service.md inbox-zero.md information-diet.md integrity-when-no-ones-watching.md integrity.md intellectual-sourcing.md joy.md judge-not.md judgment-seat.md justification.md'''.split()
notes = Path('content/english/notes')
bad = []
for f in names:
    p = notes / f
    if not p.exists():
        bad.append(f'MISSING {f}')
        continue
    raw_fm, _ = split_frontmatter(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    fm = yaml.safe_load(raw_fm) or {}
    desc = fm.get('description', '').strip()
    kc = fm.get('key_concept', '')
    kc1 = kc.strip().split('\n')[0].strip() if isinstance(kc, str) and kc else ''
    if desc == kc1:
        bad.append(f'DUP {f}')
    if re.search(r'(?:Matthew|Mark|Luke|John|Romans|Galatians)\s+\d+:\d+|\(\d+:\d+', desc):
        bad.append(f'VERSE {f}')
print('issues:', bad or 'none')
print('checked', len(names), 'files')
"

```

```
issues: none
checked 53 files

```
</details></tool-use>

Notable fixes: 12 dupes broken (e.g. `accountability`, `building-a-second-brain`, `integrity`), long wikilink blurbs trimmed (`creative-output`, `digital-garden`, `faith-and-works`), and faith notes de-versed in description (`by-their-fruits`, `judge-not`, `justification`).
